title: apargia aurea
intro: Apargia aurea, also known as Golden Flowering Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Apargia aurea include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Apargia aurea is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and can also be used topically as a poultice or cream to enhance its therapeutic effects.
